title: JOHNNY’s Potions
description: Changed all potion textures and added animations to them
body:
**I intention in creating this texture pack is to make the original potion look and taste better**
 
**我的创作初衷是让原版的药水看上去更好看，同时更好喝）~~（虽然听上去有点奇怪）~~**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **This texture pack requires you to install optifine to run**
- **这个纹理包需要你安装optifine才能运行**


</details>


![potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76ec0938607285c1f6c2d087a1e52a9d7b25c7de.png)

![potion2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f153f824cd645c33374f3f0f8c51ffeaa9e8f7e9.png)

**Will keep updated, please look forward to my follow-up creation!**

**会保持更新的，敬请期待我的后续创作！**
